2318580.name: Delivery Issues
2318580.description:
Eve is tasked by her uncle to join the family delivery business, WINGS, after her lazy cousin, JD, decides to quit. Unfortunately, it’s not as simple as merely delivering packages, especially not with a mysterious virus hanging over the city of Redino. With the help of some talented friends—and even a potential romantic partner—Eve not only races against the clock; she must also save her beloved city, and possibly, the world.

Nostalgia and exciting platforming come together in our newest game, Delivery Issues! Take on the role of Evangeline (more commonly known as Eve), as you join the family delivery business, WINGS. Run, jump, climb, and even throw your wares as you wend through diverse streets and buildings in order to deliver all your packages on time! Avoid pitfalls, watch out for locals, and keep your wits about you as you honor the family legacy and deal with a mysterious and dark virus threatening humanity. 

  • Race against the clock to deliver packages through 30+ hand-crafted levels by running, climbing, swimming, and more. 

  • Discover unique power-ups, like jetpacks and hook shots, to make your job a little bit easier. 

  • Need to save time? Launch your packages at any enemies blocking your way! 

  • Find shortcuts, secrets, and hidden passageways to deliver packages and earn your place at WINGS!

Wonder what you can expect from Delivery Issues? There is so much, including: 

  • Stepping back to the turn of the millennium before modern technology became mainstream

  • 30 levels full of enemies and chaotic challenges

  • Optional increased difficulty options of existing levels, complete with unique modifiers and designs

  • Shops where you can spend your hard-earned cash on upgrades and new skills! 

  • A vibrant world filled with lively characters—meet new friends and learn more about the town as you deliver package after package

  • Competitive multiplayer options. Want to prove that you’re the best? Challenge your friends online or in-person on any of the levels and see who comes up on top! Don’t forget to also compare scores on the online leaderboard.
2318580.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲
*具有完全音频支持的语言
